headline: Qualcomm surges on report of OpenAI tie-up for AI smartphone processors
summary: Qualcomm shares jumped 13% in premarket trading on Monday after an analyst said OpenAI was working with the chip designer ‌and Taiwan's MediaTek to develop smartphone processors.  Qualcomm and MediaTek are co-development ‌partners for an AI-first smartphone that the ChatGPT creator is planning, with mass production likely in ​2028, TF International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo said in a post on social media platform X.  China's Luxshare, an Apple supplier, is the exclusive system design and manufacturing partner for the device, according to Kuo, who is based in Taiwan and known ‌for his accurate predictions ⁠on Apple's products.

content.title: Qualcomm surges on report of OpenAI tie-up for AI smartphone processors
content.summary: Qualcomm shares jumped 13% in premarket trading on Monday after an analyst said OpenAI was working with the chip designer ‌and Taiwan's MediaTek to develop smartphone processors.  Qualcomm and MediaTek are co-development ‌partners for an AI-first smartphone that the ChatGPT creator is planning, with mass production likely in ​2028, TF International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo said in a post on social media platform X.  China's Luxshare, an Apple supplier, is the exclusive system design and manufacturing partner for the device, according to Kuo, who is based in Taiwan and known ‌for his accurate predictions ⁠on Apple's products.

headline: OpenAI + Qualcomm Tie-Up Signals AI Smartphone Revolution: Should Apple Be Worried?

headline: Navitas Semiconductor: When A 74x Sales Multiple Meets Structural Reality
summary: Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) stock has surged 110% in less than four months, a breathtaking rally for any company. Its price-to-sales multiple ballooned from 26.8x to a massive 74.3x during this period. This gain happened just as revenues over the last year actually declined by -45.

content.title: Navitas Semiconductor: When A 74x Sales Multiple Meets Structural Reality
content.summary: Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) stock has surged 110% in less than four months, a breathtaking rally for any company. Its price-to-sales multiple ballooned from 26.8x to a massive 74.3x during this period. This gain happened just as revenues over the last year actually declined by -45.

headline: Apple Is a Loser From a New OpenAI Phone. This Stock Is a Potential Winner.
summary: ChatGPT-developer OpenAI is reportedly planning to release a smartphone.  OpenAI is collaborating with Qualcomm as well as other companies to develop processors for a smartphone, with mass production expected to start in 2028, according to Ming-Chi Kuo, an analyst for TF International Securities known for watching technology supply chains.  Apple  was down 1.3% in morning trading.
